query: What refund window does the store offer for shoes that do not fit?

retrieved_contents.title: Store Returns Policy
retrieved_contents.raw_text: Customers can return unworn shoes within 30 days of delivery for a full refund. Exchanges are free when inventory is available.

retrieved_contents.title: Support FAQ
retrieved_contents.raw_text: The support team recommends starting a return from the orders page. Refunds are sent to the original payment method after the warehouse receives the shoes.

expected_answer: The store offers a 30-day refund window for unworn shoes, and customers can start the return from the orders page.

query: How long can F-1 students stay in the U.S. after graduation?

retrieved_contents.title: F-1 Visa Grace Period
retrieved_contents.raw_text: Students on F-1 visas are generally allowed to remain in the United States for up to 60 days after completing their academic program, unless they begin approved OPT or transfer to another school.

retrieved_contents.title: University International Office Guidance
retrieved_contents.raw_text: The post-completion grace period gives graduates time to prepare for departure, transfer schools, or change immigration status.

expected_answer: F-1 students can usually stay for up to 60 days after graduation, unless they move into another approved immigration path such as OPT or a school transfer.

query: What are the main health benefits of regular walking?

retrieved_contents.title: Walking and Heart Health
retrieved_contents.raw_text: Regular walking can improve cardiovascular fitness, help manage weight, and lower the risk of high blood pressure. It also supports better endurance over time.

retrieved_contents.title: Movement and Mood
retrieved_contents.raw_text: Light aerobic activity such as walking can reduce stress and improve mood, especially when done consistently.

expected_answer: Regular walking supports heart health, weight management, blood pressure control, endurance, and better mood.

query: Why do teams use feature flags in software delivery?

retrieved_contents.title: Feature Flag Overview
retrieved_contents.raw_text: Feature flags let teams release code to production without exposing it to all users immediately. This makes it easier to test gradually, limit blast radius, and roll back by toggling configuration instead of redeploying.

retrieved_contents.title: Release Strategy Notes
retrieved_contents.raw_text: Teams often pair feature flags with canary releases so they can gather feedback before a full launch.

expected_answer: Teams use feature flags to decouple deployment from release, enable gradual rollouts, reduce risk, and roll back quickly without a redeploy.

query: What causes the sky to appear blue during the day?

retrieved_contents.title: Rayleigh Scattering Explained
retrieved_contents.raw_text: Sunlight contains many wavelengths of light. Molecules in Earth's atmosphere scatter shorter blue wavelengths more strongly than longer red wavelengths, which makes the sky appear blue to human observers.

retrieved_contents.title: Why Sunsets Look Red
retrieved_contents.raw_text: At sunrise and sunset, sunlight passes through more atmosphere, so more blue light is scattered away before it reaches your eyes.

expected_answer: The daytime sky looks blue because atmospheric molecules scatter short blue wavelengths of sunlight more strongly than longer red wavelengths.

query: How many vacation days do new employees get per year?

retrieved_contents.title: Employee Handbook 2023
retrieved_contents.raw_text: New employees accrue 15 vacation days per year, available after a 90-day probation period.

retrieved_contents.title: Employee Handbook 2025 (current)
retrieved_contents.raw_text: Effective January 2025, all new employees receive 20 vacation days per year from their start date. This supersedes prior handbook versions.

expected_answer: According to the current 2025 handbook, new employees receive 20 vacation days per year from their start date, superseding the older policy of 15 days after probation.

query: What is the maximum daily dose of the supplement described in the leaflet?

retrieved_contents.title: Product Leaflet
retrieved_contents.raw_text: Do not exceed 400 mg per day. Adults may take one 200 mg capsule up to twice daily with meals.

retrieved_contents.title: Wellness Blog Review
retrieved_contents.raw_text: Some users report taking three or four capsules a day for faster results, though the manufacturer has not commented.

expected_answer: The leaflet states a maximum of 400 mg per day (one 200 mg capsule up to twice daily); the blog's mention of higher user-reported doses contradicts the manufacturer's stated limit.

query: What was the company's revenue in the fourth quarter?

retrieved_contents.title: Q3 Financial Summary
retrieved_contents.raw_text: Third-quarter revenue reached $4.2 million, up 8% year over year, driven by subscription growth.

retrieved_contents.title: Company Press Page
retrieved_contents.raw_text: The company will announce fourth-quarter results at its investor call scheduled for February 12.

expected_answer: The provided sources do not contain fourth-quarter revenue; they only report Q3 revenue of $4.2 million and note that Q4 results will be announced on February 12.

query: Who is the current CEO of Meridian Labs?

retrieved_contents.title: About Meridian Labs
retrieved_contents.raw_text: Meridian Labs was founded in 2015 and is headquartered in Austin, Texas. The company employs around 300 people across three offices.

retrieved_contents.title: Meridian Product Overview
retrieved_contents.raw_text: Meridian's flagship platform provides supply-chain analytics for mid-market manufacturers.

expected_answer: The provided sources do not identify Meridian Labs' current CEO; they only cover the company's founding year, headquarters, size, and products.

query: What is the penalty for returning a rental car late?

retrieved_contents.title: Rental Terms and Conditions
retrieved_contents.raw_text: Vehicles returned more than 59 minutes after the scheduled time incur an additional full-day charge. A grace period of 59 minutes applies to all returns.

retrieved_contents.title: Partner Hotel Cancellation Policy
retrieved_contents.raw_text: Hotel bookings cancelled within 24 hours of check-in forfeit the first night's rate.

retrieved_contents.title: Airline Change Fees
retrieved_contents.raw_text: Flight changes made within 7 days of departure cost $75 per passenger on economy fares.

expected_answer: Returning the rental car more than 59 minutes late incurs an additional full-day charge; returns within the 59-minute grace period are not penalized.

query: Which browser versions does the dashboard officially support?

retrieved_contents.title: System Requirements
retrieved_contents.raw_text: The dashboard supports the two most recent major versions of Chrome, Firefox, and Edge, and Safari 16 or newer. Internet Explorer is not supported.

retrieved_contents.title: Mobile App Requirements
retrieved_contents.raw_text: The mobile app requires iOS 15+ or Android 11+.

retrieved_contents.title: API Client Libraries
retrieved_contents.raw_text: Official SDKs are published for Python 3.10+, Node.js 18+, and Go 1.21+.

expected_answer: The dashboard officially supports the two most recent major versions of Chrome, Firefox, and Edge, plus Safari 16 or newer; Internet Explorer is not supported.

query: What is the total fee for an international wire transfer of $2,000?

retrieved_contents.title: Fee Schedule
retrieved_contents.raw_text: International wire transfers cost a flat $25 plus 0.5% of the transferred amount. Domestic wires cost a flat $15.

retrieved_contents.title: Transfer Limits
retrieved_contents.raw_text: Daily international transfer limit is $10,000 for standard accounts and $50,000 for premium accounts.

expected_answer: An international wire of $2,000 costs $35 in total: the flat $25 fee plus 0.5% of $2,000 ($10).

query: How long does the full onboarding process take from application to first shift?

retrieved_contents.title: Hiring Process
retrieved_contents.raw_text: Applications are reviewed within 5 business days, followed by a single interview scheduled within one week of review.

retrieved_contents.title: Onboarding Guide
retrieved_contents.raw_text: After an offer is accepted, background checks take 3 to 5 business days, and orientation is held every Monday. New hires may start shifts the day after orientation.

expected_answer: End to end it takes roughly three to four weeks: up to 5 business days for application review, an interview within a week, 3-5 business days for the background check, then the next Monday orientation with shifts starting the following day.

query: Is the museum open on Monday holidays?

retrieved_contents.title: Museum Hours
retrieved_contents.raw_text: The museum is closed on Mondays. It is open Tuesday through Sunday from 10:00 to 17:30.

retrieved_contents.title: Holiday Schedule
retrieved_contents.raw_text: On public holidays that fall on a Monday, the museum opens with Sunday hours and closes the following Tuesday instead.

expected_answer: Yes — on public holidays that fall on a Monday the museum opens with Sunday hours (10:00 to 17:30) and closes the following Tuesday instead.

query: When does the early-bird discount for the conference end?

retrieved_contents.title: Conference Tickets
retrieved_contents.raw_text: Early-bird pricing of $299 is available until March 31 or while the first 500 tickets last, whichever comes first. Standard pricing is $449.

retrieved_contents.title: Conference FAQ
retrieved_contents.raw_text: As of March 10, over 460 early-bird tickets have been sold.

expected_answer: Early-bird pricing ends on March 31 or when the first 500 tickets sell out, whichever comes first — and as of March 10 more than 460 were already sold, so it may end before March 31.

query: What are the system requirements and price of the Pro plan?

retrieved_contents.title: Pricing
retrieved_contents.raw_text: The Pro plan costs $24 per user per month billed annually, or $29 billed monthly.

retrieved_contents.title: Changelog
retrieved_contents.raw_text: Version 3.2 added dark mode and improved export performance by 40%.

expected_answer: The Pro plan costs $24 per user per month billed annually ($29 monthly); the provided sources do not list system requirements.

query: Which cities does the shuttle serve and how often does it run?

retrieved_contents.title: Shuttle Routes
retrieved_contents.raw_text: The shuttle serves Riverton, Lakewood, and Fairview, with a stop at the regional airport.

retrieved_contents.title: Contact Us
retrieved_contents.raw_text: For schedule questions, call the dispatch office between 6:00 and 22:00 daily.

expected_answer: The shuttle serves Riverton, Lakewood, and Fairview plus the regional airport; the sources do not state how often it runs.

query: Can I use the gym membership at other branch locations?

retrieved_contents.title: Membership Tiers
retrieved_contents.raw_text: Standard memberships are valid at the home branch only. Plus memberships include access to all branches nationwide.

retrieved_contents.title: Branch Directory
retrieved_contents.raw_text: The network includes 42 branches across 12 states, with new locations opening in Denver and Tampa this year.

expected_answer: It depends on the tier: Standard memberships work only at the home branch, while Plus memberships grant access to all 42 branches nationwide.

query: Does the warranty cover water damage to the headphones?

retrieved_contents.title: Warranty Terms
retrieved_contents.raw_text: The two-year limited warranty covers manufacturing defects. Damage from liquids, drops, or unauthorized repair is excluded.

retrieved_contents.title: Product Specifications
retrieved_contents.raw_text: The headphones carry an IPX4 splash-resistance rating, suitable for sweat and light rain.

expected_answer: No — the warranty excludes liquid damage. The IPX4 rating means the headphones tolerate splashes in normal use, but water damage itself is not covered.

query: What happens to unused credits at the end of the billing cycle?

retrieved_contents.title: Billing Overview
retrieved_contents.raw_text: Monthly plans include 1,000 credits. Unused credits expire at the end of each billing cycle and do not roll over.

retrieved_contents.title: Credit Add-ons
retrieved_contents.raw_text: Purchased add-on credit packs never expire and are consumed only after plan credits are exhausted.

expected_answer: Plan credits expire at the end of each billing cycle without rolling over, but purchased add-on credits never expire and are used only after plan credits run out.
